title: Automatically remove deleted users from assigned  tasks.
excerpt: When the users which was active for a long period of time and had a lot of assigned tasks gets resigned and deleted from Monday, all the tasks the were under that user get “new owener” - deleted user. That deleted user a…

posts.author: Andriy_Sushko (Andriy)
posts.cookedHtml: When the users which was active for a long period of time and had a lot of assigned tasks gets resigned and deleted from Monday, all the tasks the were under that user get “new owener” - deleted user. That deleted user appears on the Workload dashboard. Manually unassign deleted user from all 1k+ tasks isn’t a solution
